opportunity_lenses.name: audience
questions: Who has this problem most intensely?
Who has this problem repeatedly?
Who already pays for a workaround?
Who has reputation or revenue risk if this goes wrong?

opportunity_lenses.name: painful_moment
questions: When does the user feel stuck?
When does delay become expensive?
When does coordination break?
When does trust or verification matter?

opportunity_lenses.name: current_alternative
questions: What does the customer do today instead?
Which tool, person, agency, spreadsheet, or manual process substitutes for this?
What does doing nothing cost?
What is good about the current alternative?

opportunity_lenses.name: broken_tradeoff
questions: Is the current alternative too slow?
Is it too expensive?
Is it too hard to trust?
Does it require too much management?
Does it fail when quality matters?

opportunity_lenses.name: scope
questions: For which customer/context is the claim most true?
Which edge cases can be excluded for now?
Where does the product become much harder?
What is the smallest useful version?

opportunity_lenses.name: timing
questions: What changed recently?
Why would this be easier now than two years ago?
What new behavior, platform, regulation, or technology creates urgency?
Is this timing real or just hype?

validation_tests.name: manual concierge test
validation_tests.use_when: The solution can be delivered manually before building software
validation_tests.output: Run the workflow for 3-5 target customers and measure willingness to pay or repeat usage

validation_tests.name: cold outreach test
validation_tests.use_when: The audience is reachable by email, LinkedIn, communities, or lists
validation_tests.output: Send a scoped pain-based message and measure reply quality

validation_tests.name: fake door test
validation_tests.use_when: The value proposition can be described before product exists
validation_tests.output: Landing page or form measuring intent from the exact niche

validation_tests.name: workflow teardown
validation_tests.use_when: The customer currently uses a messy manual or multi-tool workflow
validation_tests.output: Interview users and document current steps, costs, delays, and failure points

validation_tests.name: paid pilot
validation_tests.use_when: The problem is expensive enough to justify immediate payment
validation_tests.output: Sell a narrow pilot before building a scalable product
